title: Lepro Head Torch, Super Bright LED Headlamp with 6 Lighting Modes, Waterproof, Battery Powered LED Lightweight Headlight for Cycling Running Camping for Kids Adults [Not Included Battery]
features: Long-Lasting Battery Power - This head torch battery powered utilizes high-efficiency LED technology, delivering up to 10 hours of continuous runtime in low-light mode. The battery-powered design eliminates the need to rely on built-in rechargeable batteries, allowing you to easily swap in spare batteries during wilderness excursions or long journeys. This ensures uninterrupted lighting, significantly enhancing safety and convenience during outdoor activities

6 Professional Lighting Modes - We've designed six lighting modes to cover both everyday and emergency situations, meeting the demands of professional users. The four primary modes: Low Spot, Low Flood, High Spot, and High Flood, enabling flexible switching between near and far distance requirements. Two emergency signaling modes : Steady Red Light and Red/Green Flashing (SOS signal with high visibility in adverse weather), providing an extra layer of safety

Adjustable Headband & Headlamp - The headtorch features a highly elastic, breathable, and sweat-wicking headband that can be easily adjusted to fit various head sizes without causing pressure during extended wear. The headlamp can be adjusted at 45°, allowing you to direct the beam precisely where needed without frequent readjustments. This hands-free design offers optimal lighting angles for night working, ensuring unrestricted movement

Waterproof and Lightweight - Rated IPX4 for water resistance, these head torches effectively withstand rain splashes from any direction, as well as sweat and moisture. Whether facing sudden downpours, intense sweating during exercise, or damp camping conditions, it remains fully operational. Its lightweight and compact design makes it easy to pack, serving as an essential portable tool for outdoor adventures, nighttime sports, and everyday emergency kits

Wide Usage - This versatile kids head torch is designed for a wide range of activities, from indoor tasks like DIY and reading to outdoor adventures such as camping, cycling, hiking, running, fishing, etc. It's also ideal for emergencies and car repairs. ★Note: Please note it is not a rechargeable headlamp,three AAA battery is required but 【not included】
description: Product Description Head Torch for Children and Adults Super Bright Head Torch Powerful XPG2 LED generates a powerful beam up to 1300lux. At the maximum brightness, you’ll be able to see up to 120meters. This head lamp can last 22 hours on low-light setting or give you 6 hours on the brightest level. Versatile Head Torch Weighing less than 55g, it’s comfortable to wear, that is great for runners and hikers. Perfect for camping, jogging, fishing, dog walking, hunting, and reading without disturbing others. Specifications Casing Material: ABS+PC Waterproof: IPX4 Wattage: 5W Working time: 6-22H Power Type: 3AAA Battery (Not Included) Weight: 55g(Without battery) Beam distance: 120m Brightness: 1300lux / 200lm Lightweight Its weight is only 68g. With its easily adjustable and elastic headband, wearing this head torch makes you comfortable, that would be your perfect choice. Water Resistance The headlight has IPX4 waterproof rating, meaning that is protected from splashing water, which could meet your needs for various surroundings. Pocket Size to Carry Around With a size of 63*45*35mm, this portable headlight can be easily tucked in your work out bag, backpack, toolbox, or emergency kit, and make the perfect versatile accessory. Six Lighting Modes SPOT LIGHT - Brighter in the central and illuminate far away, suitable for outdoor running, cycling, hiking, etc. FLOOD LIGHT - Light up a widespread area without dazzling the eyes, suitable for reading and household work. RED LIGHT - Steady red light can be used in nighttime reading while flashing red and green is designed for SOS/emergency.
